meaning: n.[药]毒扁豆碱(一种眼科缩瞳药)
examples: Objective To compare the myotic effects of physostigmine, pilocarpine and neostigmine in rabbits.
These results suggested that the central depressant effect of anisodine can be antagonized by physostigmine and adrenomimetics, while regitine is synergistic.
Conclusion Physostigmine, neostigmine and pilocarpine, when applied locally to the eye in rabbits, could cause myosis and their time-effect relationships were comparable.
